meta.note: Nights week — home workouts with dumbbells, med ball & bands. OTF Thursday only. Easter rest Sunday.

monday.label: Monday

exercises.name: Band Pull-Apart
exercises.cue: Straight arms, pull band across chest. Excellent for shoulder health and posture correction.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Row
exercises.cue: Anchor band at waist height, squeeze shoulder blades at end of pull. Corrects forward rounding from shifts.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press (10 lbs)
exercises.cue: Press overhead, neutral spine. Don't arch low back. Full extension at top.

exercises.name: Push-Up Variations
exercises.cue: Rotate: standard → incline → close-grip each set. Chest, shoulders, triceps.

exercises.name: Single-Arm Dumbbell Row (10 lbs)
exercises.cue: Brace on bed or chair, pull elbow up and back. Feel mid-back engaging.

exercises.name: Face Pull (band)
exercises.cue: Anchor band at head height. Pull to forehead level, thumbs back. Critical for rotator cuff and posture.

exercises.name: Neck Side Stretch + Doorway Chest Opener
exercises.cue: Hold each stretch. Breathe deeply — parasympathetic activation soothes GI and lowers cortisol.

meals.name: Breakfast
ingredients: 3 eggs scrambled with spinach, bell pepper, garlic
1 cup plain 0% Greek yogurt with blueberries + 1 tsp honey
Coffee — eat first, not on empty stomach

meals.name: Lunch
ingredients: Quinoa + romaine + cucumber + shredded carrots + feta
Olive oil & herb dressing (parsley, dill, garlic)

monday.recovery: Full stretch routine — upper body focus

tuesday.label: Tuesday

exercises.name: Med Ball Goblet Squat (20 lbs)
exercises.cue: Hold med ball at chest, chest up, knees tracking over toes. Sit back into the squat.

exercises.name: Walking Lunges (10 lb dumbbells)
exercises.cue: Step long, 90-degree knee angle. Torso upright. Great for running strength.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Glute Bridge
exercises.cue: Band above knees, drive through heels, full hip extension at top. Squeeze glutes hard.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Hip Thrust (off couch/bed)
exercises.cue: Upper back on surface, drive through heel, full hip extension. Glute isolation.

exercises.name: Med Ball Sumo Squat (20 lbs)
exercises.cue: Wide stance, toes out, hold med ball low. Targets inner thighs and glutes.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Clamshell
exercises.cue: Band above knees, side-lying. Open like a clamshell. Fires hip abductors — protects knees during runs.

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raises
exercises.cue: Full range of motion. Pause at top. Reduces calf tightness from long shifts.

meals.name: Breakfast
ingredients: ½ cup rolled oats cooked in water or almond milk

tuesday.recovery: Full stretch routine — lower body focus

wednesday.label: Wednesday

exercises.name: Med Ball Squat to Press (20 lbs)
exercises.cue: Squat down, explode up, press med ball overhead. Full body movement — mimics Circuit D thruster.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Renegade Row (10 lbs)
exercises.cue: High plank on dumbbells, alternate rows. Tremendous core and upper body.

exercises.name: Med Ball Slam (20 lbs)
exercises.cue: Raise overhead, slam to ground with full force. Explosive hip power. 30-sec rest after each set.

exercises.name: Jump Squat (or Step-Up if knees sensitive)
exercises.cue: Explosive. Mimics OTF treadmill sprint effort. Land soft, absorb with knees bent.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Romanian Deadlift
exercises.cue: Stand on band, hinge at hips, flat back. Feel hamstrings loading. Squeeze glutes at top.

exercises.name: Plank to Downward Dog
exercises.cue: Continuous movement between plank and pike. Core and shoulder stability — from Circuit D.

exercises.name: Med Ball Russian Twist (20 lbs)
exercises.cue: Seated, lean back slightly, rotate side to side with control. Oblique and core burn.

meals.name: Breakfast
ingredients: ½ cup Greek yogurt with raspberries + drizzle of honey

meals.name: Lunch
ingredients: Plain Greek yogurt + celery + Dijon + fresh dill

meals.name: Sweet Treat
ingredients: 1 small piece of your favorite sweet

meals.name: Dinner
ingredients: ¼ cup brown rice or cauliflower rice

wednesday.recovery: Stretch routine + heat on tight areas

thursday.label: Thursday

exercises.name: Full OrangeTheory Class
exercises.cue: Heart rate zone training. Push during all-out intervals — this is your primary fat-burn session of the week.

exercises.name: Focus: Treadmill Sprints
exercises.cue: Max effort on all-out pushes. Recover fully during base paces.

exercises.name: Focus: Rower Intervals
exercises.cue: Drive with legs first, then hinge back, then pull arms. Full power on each stroke.

meals.name: Breakfast
ingredients: 1 scoop protein powder + 1 cup almond milk
½ frozen banana + 1 tbsp almond butter
½ cup spinach + 1 tbsp ground flaxseed
Ginger tea instead of extra coffee

meals.name: Lunch
ingredients: Diced cucumber + shredded purple cabbage + edamame

meals.name: Dinner
ingredients: 5 oz ground turkey cooked with garlic + ginger

thursday.recovery: Ice sore areas + full stretch routine

friday.label: Friday

exercises.name: Dead Bug (10 lb dumbbell overhead)
exercises.cue: Low back stays pressed to floor. Extend opposite arm/leg slowly. Add dumbbell for challenge.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Pallof Press
exercises.cue: Anchor band at chest height, press straight out and hold 2 sec. Anti-rotation core stability.

exercises.name: Med Ball Rotational Slam (20 lbs)
exercises.cue: Rotate and slam ball to one side. Explosive oblique and core power.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Farmer's Carry (10 lbs each)
exercises.cue: Tall posture, engage core. Grip and full-body functional strength — from Circuit A.

exercises.name: Plank Hold
exercises.cue: Neutral spine, don't let hips sag or pike. Breathe steadily.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Seated Row
exercises.cue: Anchor band at foot level, seated on floor. Squeeze shoulder blades. Posture maintenance.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow + Child's Pose Flow
exercises.cue: Gently massages GI tract. Reduces cortisol. Transition into full cool-down stretch.

meals.name: Breakfast
ingredients: Top with fresh berries + 1 tsp maple syrup

meals.name: Lunch
ingredients: Mixed greens + chickpeas + cucumber + shredded carrots
Sunflower seeds + olive oil + fresh parsley

meals.name: Sweet Treat
ingredients: ½ cup plain Greek yogurt spread on parchment

meals.name: Dinner
meals.note: Red meat is a mild reflux risk — keep portion moderate and eat early
ingredients: Bok choy + snap peas + bell pepper + garlic

friday.recovery: Heat on tight areas (Day 2 post-OTF) + stretch

exercises.name: Warm-Up: 4 × 50 yds easy freestyle
exercises.cue: Long strokes, exhale fully underwater. 15 sec rest between each.

exercises.name: Kick Set: 4 × 25 yds kickboard
exercises.cue: Flutter kick. Engages core and legs. Easy pace. 20 sec rest between.

exercises.name: Main Set 1: 4 × 100 yds freestyle
exercises.cue: Moderate effort. Aim for consistent splits. 20 sec rest between each.

exercises.name: Main Set 2: 2 × 150 yds steady freestyle
exercises.cue: Steady pace. Add a few strokes of backstroke for shoulder relief. 30 sec rest.

exercises.name: Pull Set: 4 × 50 yds with pull buoy
exercises.cue: Upper body isolation. Reduces leg fatigue. 15 sec rest between.

exercises.name: Cool-Down: 4 × 25 yds very easy
exercises.cue: Easy freestyle or backstroke. Focus on breath and stroke length.

exercises.name: 5-min Float Recovery
exercises.cue: Float on your back — zero effort. Sensory calm reduces cortisol measurably. Nervous system reset.

meals.name: Breakfast
ingredients: 6 egg whites + 2 eggs baked with spinach + bell pepper + feta
½ cup oatmeal with almond milk + 1 tbsp honey + flaxseed

meals.name: Dinner
ingredients: 5 oz cod with breadcrumbs + parsley + garlic + olive oil
Quinoa salad with cucumber + feta + kalamata olives

exercises.name: Full Rest — Happy Easter!
exercises.cue: No structured exercise today. Enjoy the holiday. Light walking, gentle stretching, or a leisurely stroll counts as plenty.

exercises.name: Optional: 10–15 min gentle yoga or stretching
exercises.cue: Cat-cow, child's pose, hip flexor stretch. Keep it restorative — no intensity.

exercises.name: Diaphragmatic Breathing
exercises.cue: Reduces cortisol and soothes GI. Do during any quiet moment today.

meals.name: Breakfast
meals.note: Sit upright for 30 min after eating
ingredients: 2 poached eggs on whole grain toast
¼ avocado + sliced cucumber + fresh dill

meals.name: Lunch
ingredients: Red lentils + spinach + carrots + celery + garlic
1 slice whole grain bread + thin almond butter

meals.name: Sweet Treat
ingredients: Or: one small bakery item with herbal tea

meals.name: Dinner
ingredients: 4 oz chicken thighs marinated in olive oil + garlic + fresh herbs + tiny splash ACV
Fennel tea after dinner for digestion
